Spectacular success results in the target spilling his guts about everything while an Adequate success might reveal single piece of important information_ Note that this skill mainly represents the ability t0 determine the truth of the subject's statements. Any brute with pair of pli: ers Or welding torch can get prisoner to talk, but it takes trained interrogator to know if the subject telling the truth.
idate group of characters would use the highest base TN from among all the characters in the group and add +1 for each addi- tional person in the group: Intimidation is also useful as complement to such skills as Interrogation, Streetwise and Negotiation under certain cir- cumstances the gamemaster decides that Intimidation might help the player' 5 cause looming intimidator nearby will apply negative modifier to the TN equal to the Margin of Success of an Intimidation Check against the target = CHA WIL (+2 for Brave). This modifier can be no higher than the Intimidating character $ skill bonus Intimidation failed Intimidation Check will actually hurt the effort, resulting in positive TN modifier equal to the Margin of Failure
JUMP PACKS character with this skill knows how to safely and effec tively use jump packs as mode of transportation Jump Packs Skill Checks are used whenever character attempts partic ularly difficult maneuver, such as deploying from moving vehi- cle or jumping in hazardous area Failure will result in fall (see Falling; 120), although if there is enough altitude_ the character might have chance tO recover before   hitting the grouna_ Note that Jump Packs Skill does not confer any knowledge of battlesuit systems: Gunnery /Battlesuit and Piloting /Battlesuit cover all battlesuit functions. including jumping:
